REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (728 Le Conte Ave, San Francisco, Ca 94124)
Off Calendar Jan-28-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gene Benitez, via ZOOM, for Dorothy Smedley, Personal Representative; Xiaohua Ye and Hongying, Ye, appeared in court, Buyers.

The court states that there is an issue regarding notice of hearing to the buyers. The court confirms with the buyers that they waive notice. The sale was confirmed at $912,000 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). The court confirms with counsel that he is requesting the court order the net sale proceeds to be deposited into a blocked account in lieu of ordering an additional bond.

Judge: Hon. Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: D. Primus. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-28-2021 Continued To Mar-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gener Benitez appeared by zoom for Dorothy Smedley (Administrator).

The court informed Mr. Benitez that there is a different address on the October 22, 2021 report of sale, that it shows 728 Le Conte Avenue, that it should be 978 Le Conte Avenue, and that he needs to file an amended report of sale today so that he can have the same hearing date. The court also suggested that Mr. Benitez contact the e-file clerk when he submits the amended report to avoid getting a different hearing date assigned. The court also informed Mr. Benitez that they are going to need an interim accounting because the estate was opened in 2018 or it needs to be a waiver of accounting, and that his filing needs to be a request for additional time to administer the estate or an interim accounting. Status on close of estate is continued to March 22, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to be heard after closing of the sale.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Off Calendar Aug-25-2020 Continued To Sep-22-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-14-2020 Continued To Aug-25-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gener Benitez appeared by telephone for and with Dorothy Smedley (Administrator) by telephone.

Mr. Benitez stated that they had a bond issue, that initially they thought the Decedent had four children, that it turned out the Decedent had more children and that not all of the children were willing to waive bond. Mr. Benitez also stated that there is a piece of real property, two vehicles and some personal property, that his Client is only bondable for the minimal bond, and that he is requesting limited authority and that bond be ordered in the amount of $20,000.00. The Court expressed concern that there was a misrepresentation of the property. Mr. Benitez stated it wasn't a misrepresentation, that he thinks it was a miscommunication and he may have misunderstood the question, that the property hasn't been sold, that the property is valued at $650,000.00 and that the property is still there. Status on close of estate is continued to August 25, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Mr. Benitez that either a petition for approval of report on status of administration, or a petition for final distribution needs to be filed by August 18, 2020.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jul-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-24-2020 Continued To Apr-21-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-25-2020 Continued To Mar-24-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gener Benitez for and with Dorothy Smedley.

The Court stated that it suspended Ms. Smedley's letters because it was told at the last hearing that the property was sold for $600,000.00. Mr. Benitez stated that the property has not been sold, that the eldest Child is willing to step in, but is not bondable for the entire of the estate and that a solution is to get all of the Children to waive bond. Mr. Benitez also stated that they do not have a waiver from the same Child that would not sign the waiver for Ms. Smedley and that they are hoping she will sign it for the eldest Child. The Court raised the issue of a request to amend the letters to have limited powers to address the bond. Status on close of estate is continued to March 24, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-04-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gener Benitez for and with Dorothy Smedley (Administrator).

The Court noted that they no longer have an effective bond, and that they either need to obtain waivers from all of the Beneficiaries, or bond needs to be posted. Mr. Benitez stated that they cannot get all of the waivers, that Ms. Medley is not bondable and that they are going to try and see if Valerie wants to be the Successor Administrator. Mr. Benitez also stated that the real property sold for $600,000.00 and that the personal property is about $50,000.00. The Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is off calendar. Status on close of estate is set for February 25, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 by which time there will need to be a petition for appointment of a Successor Administrator, or some other petition to resolve administration and something to address bond. Dorothy Smedley's letters of administration are suspended as of today. The Court noted that if Ms. Smedley wants to be discharged, it will require a final accounting and that a final accounting will be needed when a Successor is appointed. The Court also stated that it wants to make sure the estate assets are protected.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Jun-26-2019 Continued To Jul-10-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gener Benitez for and with Dorothy Smedley (Administrator).

Mr. Benitez stated that they filed a report last Monday, that they got a Probate Referee, that they found out two months ago that the decedent had two other children, that one of them is incarcerated and that they have not found him. Mr. Benitez also stated that they were told the decedent had a bank account with one of the children and that they are no where near being able to close the estate. The Court instructed Mr. Benitez to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Status on close of estate is continued to July 10, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar May-29-2019 Continued To Jun-26-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gener D. Benitez for and with Administrator Dorothy Smedley

Mr. Benitez stated there are 3 more children they weren't aware of from a prior marriage, there is an account the deceased had with one child which they need to check if it is POD outside of estate or will need new appraisal. The Court noted a new Inventory and Appraisal must be done by the probate referee since the original one was signed by the administrator. Mr. Benitez stated he can file a Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration by June 26, 2019 to seek more time to close the estate.

The status on closing of estate is continued to June 26, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
